'''√j-th-s''' ('''jathasa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:knack|knack]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-th-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:knack|knack]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √j-th-s
|-
! Lemma
| jathasa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jathasithi|jathasithi]] || [[word:jathasiji|jathasiji]] || [[word:jathasishi|jathasishi]] || [[word:jathasi|jathasi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jathasuthuth|jathasuthuth]] || [[word:jathasujuj|jathasujuj]] || [[word:jathasushush|jathasushush]] || [[word:jathas|jathas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jathasuthu|jathasuthu]] || [[word:jathasuju|jathasuju]] || [[word:jathasushu|jathasushu]] || [[word:jathasu|jathasu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jathasufuth|jathasufuth]] || [[word:jathasufuj|jathasufuj]] || [[word:jathasufush|jathasufush]] || [[word:jathasuf|jathasuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jathasethe|jathasethe]] || [[word:jathaseje|jathaseje]] || [[word:jathaseshe|jathaseshe]] || [[word:jathase|jathase]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jathasothoth|jathasothoth]] || [[word:jathasojoj|jathasojoj]] || [[word:jathasoshosh|jathasoshosh]] || [[word:jathas|jathas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jathasotho|jathasotho]] || [[word:jathasojo|jathasojo]] || [[word:jathasosho|jathasosho]] || [[word:jathaso|jathaso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jathasofoth|jathasofoth]] || [[word:jathasofoj|jathasofoj]] || [[word:jathasofosh|jathasofosh]] || [[word:jathasof|jathasof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:jathasïf|jathasïf]] || [[word:jathasïf|jathasïf]] || [[word:jathasïf|jathasïf]] || [[word:jathasïf|jathasïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:jathasïfïf|jathasïfïf]] || [[word:jathasïfïf|jathasïfïf]] || [[word:jathasïfïf|jathasïfïf]] || [[word:jathasïfïf|jathasïfïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:jathasïf|jathasïf]] || [[word:jathasïf|jathasïf]] || [[word:jathasïf|jathasïf]] || [[word:jathasïf|jathasïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:jathasïf|jathasïf]] || [[word:jathasïf|jathasïf]] || [[word:jathasïf|jathasïf]] || [[word:jathasïf|jathasïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jathasæthæ|jathasæthæ]] || [[word:jathasæjæ|jathasæjæ]] || [[word:jathasæshæ|jathasæshæ]] || [[word:jathasæ|jathasæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jathasathath|jathasathath]] || [[word:jathasajaj|jathasajaj]] || [[word:jathasashash|jathasashash]] || [[word:jathas|jathas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jathasatha|jathasatha]] || [[word:jathasaja|jathasaja]] || [[word:jathasasha|jathasasha]] || [[word:jathasa|jathasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jathasafath|jathasafath]] || [[word:jathasafaj|jathasafaj]] || [[word:jathasafash|jathasafash]] || [[word:jathasaf|jathasaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:jathasasha|jathasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gojathasasha|gojathasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokijathasasha|gokijathasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:jathasnüsha|jathasnüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gojathasnknüsha|gojathasnknüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokijathasnüsha|gokijathasnüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jathasshësha|jathasshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojathasnkshësha|gojathasnkshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijathasshësha|gokijathasshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jathasrosha|jathasrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojathasnkrosha|gojathasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijathasrosha|gokijathasrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jathasmusha|jathasmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gojathasnkmusha|gojathasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijathasmusha|gokijathasmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:jathassherasha|jathassherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gojathasnksherasha|gojathasnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokijathassherasha|gokijathassherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:jathasngasha|jathasngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gojathasnkngasha|gojathasnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokijathasngasha|gokijathasngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jathasyasha|jathasyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gojathasnkyasha|gojathasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokijathasyasha|gokijathasyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:jathasyamasha|jathasyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gojathasnkyamasha|gojathasnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokijathasyamasha|gokijathasyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:jathasnüshësha|jathasnüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojathasnknüshësha|gojathasnknüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijathasnüshësha|gokijathasnüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:jathasnürosha|jathasnürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojathasnknürosha|gojathasnknürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijathasnürosha|gokijathasnürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jathasnümusha|jathasnümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojathasnknümusha|gojathasnknümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijathasnümusha|gokijathasnümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:jathasshënüsha|jathasshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojathasnkshënüsha|gojathasnkshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijathasshënüsha|gokijathasshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:jathasshërosha|jathasshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojathasnkshërosha|gojathasnkshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijathasshërosha|gokijathasshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jathasshëmusha|jathasshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojathasnkshëmusha|gojathasnkshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijathasshëmusha|gokijathasshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:jathasronüsha|jathasronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojathasnkronüsha|gojathasnkronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijathasronüsha|gokijathasronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:jathasroshësha|jathasroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojathasnkroshësha|gojathasnkroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijathasroshësha|gokijathasroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jathasromusha|jathasromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojathasnkromusha|gojathasnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijathasromusha|gokijathasromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:jathasmunüsha|jathasmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojathasnkmunüsha|gojathasnkmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijathasmunüsha|gokijathasmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:jathasmushësha|jathasmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojathasnkmushësha|gojathasnkmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijathasmushësha|gokijathasmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:jathasmurosha|jathasmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojathasnkmurosha|gojathasnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijathasmurosha|gokijathasmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:jathas|jathas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:jæthæs|jæthæs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hojathas|hojathas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hojæthæs|hojæthæs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohojathas|hohojathas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohojæthæs|hohojæthæs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nüjathas|nüjathas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nüjæthæs|nüjæthæs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nünüjathas|nünüjathas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nünüjæthæs|nünüjæthæs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nïjathas|nïjathas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nïjæthæs|nïjæthæs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïjathas|nïnïjathas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïjæthæs|nïnïjæthæs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lujathas|lujathas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lujæthæs|lujæthæs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulujathas|lulujathas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulujæthæs|lulujæthæs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lijathas|lijathas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lijæthæs|lijæthæs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilijathas|lilijathas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilijæthæs|lilijæthæs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kojathas|kojathas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kojæthæs|kojæthæs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokojathas|kokojathas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokojæthæs|kokojæthæs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kejathas|kejathas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kejæthæs|kejæthæs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekejathas|kekejathas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekejæthæs|kekejæthæs]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
